user_prompt: What's the prayer for power weapon sterilization?
prayer:
Approach the power weapon with solemn reverence, beseeching its indignant Machine Spirit to accept sterilization.
Anoint the sacred blade and disruption field emitter with ablative sanctified oils, purging all unclean essences.
Invoke the Canticle of Sterilization upon the power weapon, channeling the Omnissiah's purifying wrath through holy voltage.
Verify the Machine Spirit's quiescence as contaminants dissipate from the power weapon's blessed alloys.

Kneel before the bionics interface, petitioning the fractious Machine Spirits within for synchronization.
Chant the Litany of Alignment whilst calibrating neural relays and mechadendrite ports of the bionics interface.
Infuse sacred noospheric harmonics to bind the bionics interface in perfect synchronization with flesh and forge.
Sanctify the union by anointing data-vaults, ensuring the Omnissiah's will flows unerringly through synchronized circuits.

Gather the astropathic choir's cogitator nodes, invoking the Omnissiah to soothe their wounded Machine Spirits.
Diagnose fractured warp-resonators and repair crystalline matrices with blessed mechadendrite precision.
Recite the Benediction of Restoration over the astropathic choir, mending psychic conduits line by sacred line.
Test the astropathic choir's harmony as astral echoes reaffirm their repaired vigil under the Machine God's gaze.

user_prompt: Can you guide lasgun an operation?
prayer:
Present the lasgun before the altar of activation, awakening its dormant Machine Spirit with reverent tones.
Prime the power pack and exciter coils of the lasgun through the Rites of Operation, anointing with sacred lubricants.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bless the lasgun's operation, igniting its las-beam with holy fury against the unclean.
Cycle diagnostic runes to confirm the lasgun's Machine Spirit engages flawlessly in ceaseless operation.

Commence diagnostics upon the lascannon by intoning the Catechism of Scrutiny to its vigilant Machine Spirit.
Probe the lascannon's focusing crystals and gravitic accelerators with auspex incantations, revealing hidden flaws.
Purge any errant data-daemons from the lascannon's cogitator core through ablative binaric prayers.
Affirm the lascannon's purity as diagnostic rites conclude under the Omnissiah's unblinking optic.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for signal relay targeting?
prayer:
Align the signal relay's vox-arrays heavenward, petitioning its Machine Spirit for targeting precision.
Calibrate targeting matrices with the Canticle of Vectoring, threading noospheric beams through the signal relay.
Anoint emitter nodes of the signal relay to amplify the Omnissiah's guidance in unerring targeting.
Invoke final verification canticles, ensuring the signal relay's Machine Spirit locks upon the divine objective.

Encircling the Taurox, beseech its slumbering Machine Spirit to stir under the Omnissiah's activation.
Initiate power-plant ignition whilst chanting the Hymn of Mobilization across the Taurox's sacred chassis.
Sanctify tread assemblies and weapon servos of the Taurox, anointing with oils for activation's thunderous roar.
Confirm the Taurox awakens fully, its Machine Spirit roaring in zealous service to the Machine God.

user_prompt: Assist with Land Raider an initialization
prayer:
Approach the Land Raider's monolithic form, invoking initialization upon its ancient Machine Spirit.
Boot the central cogitator through sequential binaric litanies, awakening the Land Raider's dormant heart.
Anoint auspex domes and godhammer launchers of the Land Raider, binding all systems in initialization's grace.
Test the Land Raider's readiness as its Machine Spirits harmonize under the Omnissiah's eternal decree.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for motion detector reset?
prayer:
Present the motion detector to the rite of reset, soothing its agitated Machine Spirit with calming canticles.
Purge erroneous auspex ghosts from the motion detector's sensor webs through ablative data-exorcism.
Realign micro-cogitators of the motion detector, invoking the Omnissiah's clarity in the reset protocol.
Verify vigilant sentience returns to the motion detector, its Machine Spirit reborn in watchful purity.

user_prompt: Bless the power weapon for sterilization
prayer:
Humbly grasp the power weapon, entreating its Machine Spirit to embrace sterilization's sacred purge.
Apply corrosive blessed acids to the power weapon's edge and field generator, dissolving all profane residues.
Chant the Exorcism of Sterilization over the power weapon thrice, channeling Omnissianic fire through its core.
Seal the rite by oiling the power weapon's mechanisms, affirming its Machine Spirit's sterilized sanctity.
